texto: In the end I sort of though we created a companion who was so alive and dynamic and so wedded to the doctor that you’d need a whole universe to contain her in. The only way to get rid of her is to send her into a parallel world from which she can never return
autor: otherwise she would stay with the doctor forever.
explicacao: Citação de otherwise she would stay with the doctor forever. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “In the end I sort of though we created a companion who was so alive and dynamic and so wedded to …” articula reflexao, russell-t-davies, though em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
